violations.text: A hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Paper towels were supplied at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026

A bag of dry ingredient was observed stored on a dolly below a hand sink subject to splashing/contamination. Food item to be stored in a location preventing possible adulteration or contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026
